all.en: Last weekend my family installed several smart devices around the house.
all.zh: 上週末我們全家在屋內安裝了幾個智慧家電。

all.en: We bought a smart speaker, two light bulbs, and a video doorbell.
all.zh: 我們買了一台智慧喇叭、兩顆燈泡和一個視訊門鈴。

all.en: My father proudly said the home would now respond to our voices.
all.zh: 我爸自豪地說，家裡現在可以聽我們的指令了。

all.en: However, the smart speaker refused to connect to our Wi-Fi network.
all.zh: 然而，智慧喇叭就是不肯連上我們的 Wi-Fi 網路。

all.en: I checked the router and reset the password several times.
all.zh: 我檢查了路由器，並重設了好幾次密碼。

all.en: Finally, I downloaded the manufacturer's app to diagnose the issue.
all.zh: 最後我下載了製造商的 App 來診斷問題。

all.en: It turned out our router was using an outdated security protocol.
all.zh: 原來我們的路由器使用了過時的安全協定。

all.en: After updating the firmware, every device finally came online.
all.zh: 更新韌體之後，每個裝置終於都連上線了。

all.en: My mother loved telling the lights to turn off from her bed.
all.zh: 我媽超愛從床上叫燈關掉。

all.en: My little sister kept asking the speaker silly questions for fun.
all.zh: 我妹則一直為了好玩問喇叭一些蠢問題。

all.en: It felt like our ordinary house had suddenly entered the future.
all.zh: 感覺我們平凡的家突然走進了未來。

all.en: A week later, my grandmother came to visit and was amazed by everything.
all.zh: 一週後，我的祖母來訪，對一切都感到驚奇不已。

all.en: She watched in wonder as the lights changed color with a single voice command.
all.zh: 她驚奇地看著燈光隨著一句口令就變換顏色。

all.en: My father proudly demonstrated how the doorbell sent alerts directly to his phone.
all.zh: 我爸自豪地示範門鈴如何把通知直接傳到他的手機上。

all.en: However, the smart speaker kept mistaking my grandmother's accent for random commands.
all.zh: 不過，智慧喇叭一直把祖母的口音誤聽成隨機指令。

all.en: It once turned on every light in the house at three in the morning.
all.zh: 它有一次在凌晨三點把屋裡所有的燈都打開了。

all.en: We laughed about it the next day while teaching her how to use it properly.
all.zh: 我們隔天一邊大笑一邊教她正確使用的方法。

all.en: She quickly learned to ask for weather updates and to play classical music.
all.zh: 她很快就學會詢問天氣預報，以及讓喇叭播放古典音樂。

all.en: My little sister created funny morning routines that announced school subjects aloud.
all.zh: 我妹妹設計了有趣的晨間程序，會大聲念出當天的學校科目。

all.en: My mother enjoyed setting timers for cooking without touching her dirty fingers.
all.zh: 我媽喜歡不用碰到髒手就能設定烹飪計時器的方便。

all.en: Slowly, our smart home felt less like technology and more like a helpful family member.
all.zh: 漸漸地，我們的智慧家居不再像冷冰冰的科技，而更像一位樂於幫忙的家人。

all.en: A month later, my father added a smart thermostat to control the house temperature.
all.zh: 一個月後，父親加裝了一台智慧恆溫器來控制屋內溫度。

all.en: Our electricity bill dropped noticeably during the first cold week of winter.
all.zh: 在冬天第一個寒冷的星期，我們的電費明顯下降。

all.en: My grandmother started leaving voice notes for the speaker to remind her about medicine.
all.zh: 祖母開始留下語音訊息給喇叭，提醒她吃藥。

all.en: She said the gentle reminders helped her feel safer when living alone at night.
all.zh: 她說那些溫柔的提醒讓她獨自度過夜晚時感覺更安心。

all.en: My little sister programmed the lights to flash red whenever the timer ended.
all.zh: 我妹妹把燈設定成計時器結束時就閃紅光。

all.en: It made cooking dinner feel like a small, exciting science experiment every evening.
all.zh: 那讓每晚做晚餐都像一場小而興奮的科學實驗。

all.en: One stormy night, the doorbell camera captured a lost cat trying to find shelter.
all.zh: 在一個暴風雨之夜，門鈴攝影機拍到一隻迷路的貓正在尋找避難所。

all.en: We brought the cat inside and posted photos in our neighborhood community group.
all.zh: 我們把貓帶進屋裡，並把照片發到鄰里社區的群組。

all.en: The next morning, a tearful owner came to thank us and reclaim her pet.
all.zh: 隔天早上，淚眼汪汪的飼主前來道謝並把愛貓接回。

all.en: Our smart home had quietly become a guardian for both family and neighbors alike.
all.zh: 我們的智慧家居悄悄地成了家人與鄰居共同的守護者。

all.en: By spring, our smart home had expanded to include a robot vacuum and curtains.
all.zh: 到了春天，我們的智慧家居又新增了掃地機器人和智慧窗簾。

all.en: My father loved watching the curtains open automatically as the morning sun rose.
all.zh: 父親喜歡看著窗簾隨著朝陽升起而自動拉開。

all.en: The vacuum cleaned every corner while we ate breakfast and prepared for our days.
all.zh: 我們吃早餐、準備出門時，掃地機器人就會清掃每一個角落。

all.en: My grandmother had moved closer and visited the house several times every week.
all.zh: 祖母搬到附近後，每週都會來家裡好幾趟。

all.en: She now confidently controlled lights, music, and reminders with simple, clear voice commands.
all.zh: 她現在能用簡單清楚的語音指令，自信地控制燈光、音樂和提醒事項。

all.en: My little sister built a routine that wished everyone goodnight in three different languages.
all.zh: 我妹妹設計了一套晚安程序，用三種不同的語言向大家道晚安。

all.en: The lost cat we once rescued had a sibling who later needed a permanent home.
all.zh: 我們曾救助的那隻迷貓有個手足，後來也需要一個永久的家。

all.en: We adopted her and named her Pixel because she loved sitting near our devices.
all.zh: 我們領養了她，並取名「像素」，因為她最愛坐在我們的裝置旁邊。

all.en: Pixel often triggered the speaker by accident, asking us about the weather forecast.
all.zh: 像素常常意外觸發喇叭，詢問我們天氣預報。

all.en: Our smart home was no longer just clever but truly full of warmth and life.
all.zh: 我們的智慧家居不再只是聰明，更充滿了溫暖與生命力。

all.en: By summer, Pixel had figured out how to nudge the speaker for her favorite music.
all.zh: 到了夏天，像素已經學會用鼻子推喇叭，讓它播放她最愛的音樂。

all.en: She preferred soft piano pieces and curled up peacefully on the warm living room rug.
all.zh: 她偏好柔和的鋼琴曲，並安靜地蜷縮在客廳溫暖的地毯上。

all.en: My father installed a small smart camera so we could check on Pixel during work.
all.zh: 父親加裝了一個小型智慧攝影機，讓我們上班時也能查看像素的情況。

all.en: We often watched her chase sunbeams across the kitchen floor through the camera feed.
all.zh: 我們常透過攝影機畫面，看她在廚房地板上追逐陽光。

all.en: My grandmother taught the speaker to remind her of family birthdays and important medical appointments.
all.zh: 祖母教喇叭提醒她家人的生日和重要的醫療預約。

all.en: Our neighbors asked my little sister to help set up similar systems in their homes.
all.zh: 鄰居們請我妹妹幫忙在他們家中架設類似的系統。

all.en: She started a small weekend service teaching seniors how to control devices with kind patience.
all.zh: 她開設了一個週末小型服務，耐心親切地教長輩們控制各種裝置。

all.en: The local newspaper featured her as a young community helper bridging generations through gentle technology.
all.zh: 當地報紙特別介紹她，稱讚她是用溫柔科技串連世代的年輕社區小幫手。

all.en: My father proudly hung the article on the smart fridge, which read it aloud occasionally.
all.zh: 父親自豪地把這篇報導貼在智慧冰箱上，冰箱偶爾還會把它念出來。

all.en: Our smart home had quietly become an extended family of devices, neighbors, and curious cats.
all.zh: 我們的智慧家居悄悄成了一個由裝置、鄰居和好奇貓咪組成的大家庭。
